title: Von Thomas Next
description: A real catering operations and SEO-growth system with online booking, admin workflows, and city-service expansion planning.
body:
Von Thomas Next is a shipped operations platform for catering workflows.

It turns a messy service process into a web system: customers move through a clearer booking flow, the team gets admin visibility, and orders become easier to prepare without endless manual back-and-forth. The product sits close to the real business process: customer intent, menu choices, timing, communication, preparation, and operational handoff.

## What it supports

- Online catering configuration and booking flows for real customer requests.
- Admin workflows for day-to-day operational decisions.
- Inbox and communication visibility around customer requests.
- Order preparation, same-day edge cases, and kitchen-ready handoff.
- A public web surface that can grow through search, better landing pages, and clearer service positioning.

## Recent work

The newest layer is a public-safe SEO expansion plan for local catering demand. We looked at how competing catering sites structure local landing pages, then translated that into a cleaner plan for Von Thomas: city pages, service pages, money pages, and micro-local coverage.

The main finding was not that the site needed more random pages. The useful insight was the structure: search demand often sits at the intersection of a city and a concrete service, such as business catering, event catering, party service, lunch catering, or fingerfood. The plan turns that into a phased rollout instead of a one-shot content dump.

## What changed in the story

Von Thomas is no longer described only as an ordering/admin system. The project page now frames it as an operations system plus a distribution system: the same product that makes the work easier internally also needs a stronger public surface so the right customers can find the right service page.

## Why it matters

This is the kind of software I like building: not a slide deck, not a toy AI demo, but an operational system that removes friction from a real business process and can grow through better distribution.

## Public boundary

This page does not include client-private data, internal process details, campaign data, customer data, database exports, or operational documents. It describes the public product surface, the SEO direction, and the type of workflows it supports.
